# BuildGuide Full Context

## Product Summary
BuildGuide helps users decide what to build with AI, choose tools based on priorities (budget, speed, quality), and complete setup steps with checklists and debugging support.

## Main Experience
1. Choose a build goal.
2. Set priorities or follow a specialized path (IDE path).
3. Review tool options.
4. Follow setup steps.
5. Complete and launch.

## SEO/Discovery Endpoints
- /sitemap.xml
- /robots.txt
- /llms.txt

## Guide Paths

### Website
- /guide/website
- Goal: launch a portfolio, landing page, or business site.

### Web App
- /guide/webapp
- Goal: build an interactive app with auth, data, and deployment.

### Chatbot
- /guide/chatbot
- Goal: build a robust chatbot stack (provider, backend, memory, deployment).

### IDE Path
- /guide/ide
- Goal: choose IDE + AI agent + build target and follow integrated setup.

### AI Coding Tools
- /guide/aitools
- Goal: set up editor, terminal, dependencies, and coding agents.

### Local AI
- /guide/localai
- Goal: run AI models locally for privacy/offline use.

### Automation
- /guide/automation
- Goal: automate repeatable tasks with AI-assisted workflows.

### Mobile App
- /guide/mobileapp
- Goal: ship iOS/Android app workflows.

### Database
- /guide/database
- Goal: choose and configure app databases.

### Deployment
- /guide/deployment
- Goal: staging and production release workflows.

### Security
- /guide/security
- Goal: avoid common security mistakes.

### Testing
- /guide/testing
- Goal: unit/e2e testing and reliability workflows.

### Best Practices
- /guide/bestpractices
- Goal: engineering discipline and maintainability standards.

### Prompt Engineering
- /guide/prompting
- Goal: improve prompt quality and output reliability.

### Agent Development
- /guide/agentdev
- Goal: design and ship reliable AI agents.

### Design Flow
- /guide/designflow
- Goal: choose design tools and sequence work correctly.

### Not Sure
- /guide/notsure
- Goal: discover an appropriate path when requirements are unclear.

## Data Freshness
Content is updated iteratively as tools and workflows evolve. Prefer canonical route content over screenshots or stale references.
